name: Cod Black Bean
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fish in an even layer (tucking under thin ends) on a broiler pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Combine minced garlic and 2 tablespoons of lime juice; spread mixture over the fish.
3. Broil about 4 inches from heat for about 5 minutes, or until the fish just flakes when tested with a fork.
4. Transfer to a dish and let cool for 10 minutes.
5. In a small jar, combine remaining 1 tablespoon of oil, 2 tablespoons of lime juice, ground cumin, red pepper flakes (or cayenne pepper), and salt. Shake well.
6. Pour 1 tablespoon over the fish.
7. Peel the orange and cut into half-inch slices. Separate into segments.
8. Combine with drained black beans and remaining dressing.
9. Drain the fish, break into large chunks, and remove any bones.
10. Add to the orange mixture and toss gently.
11. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours or up to 24 hours.
12. Makes 3 servings. (Recipe can be doubled.)
